channel.title: Expereince on Dheepak's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Expereince on Dheepak's blog

item.title: Stayed out for long
item.description: After completing the college we scattered across the geography, looking after our career path. We no longer able to connect with each other as like earlier. There were some commitments, duties to discharge and the distance grows between the friends, even phone calls reduced. But one weekend we gathered. There were visible discomfort among us. These are all irrelevant but one single quote from one of the guy, lets call him K.
